completion_data.completion_summary: Completed core irreflexive semantics refactoring: switched truth_at from <= to <, removed T-axioms, restructured soundness into frame-class specific theorems (axiom_valid_dense, axiom_valid_discrete), added derived reflexive operators, updated FMCS coherence conditions.
